articles.title: Patriots free agency live updates: Tracking New England’s top offseason pickups
articles.description:
The Patriots have over $50 million in cap space to shore up several areas of their roster.

The post Patriots free agency live updates: Tracking New England’s top offseason pickups appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Patriots have over $50 million in cap space for offseason improvements.
Team aims to address key roster areas through strategic free agency signings.
Local fans can expect enhanced team performance in the upcoming season.

articles.title: Boston Marathon runner aims to complete marathons in all 50 states
articles.description:
Zara Harding has run more than a dozen marathons since her cancer diagnosis. After Boston, she only has 10 to go.

The post Boston Marathon runner aims to complete marathons in all 50 states appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Zara Harding, a Boston Marathon runner, has completed over a dozen marathons since her cancer diagnosis.
After the Boston Marathon, Harding will have 10 states left to complete her goal of 50 marathons.
Her journey inspires Boston residents and highlights the resilience of cancer survivors in the community.
